case_title: MAKSIMILIAN KOGAN VS. CARLOS ESPINOSA et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR LAWRENCE ARTHUR BENNETT APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-04-2003 THROUGH JUN-02-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, LAWRENCE A. BENNETT TO COUNSELS; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: APRIL 30, 2003 @ 4:00 PM
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE COMPLAINT, ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-30-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOGAN, MAKSIMILIAN AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, CARLOS DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-18-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-19-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CERTIFICATE OF PROGRESS; INABILITY TO DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOGAN, MAKSIMILIAN
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-18-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-27-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). DEC-02-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, CARLOS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-17-2003. JAN-27-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE FEB-28-2003.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WILLIS C. SILVERTHORNE.
